meaning: n.海员,水手,不大会晕船的人,船员
examples: A sailor carrying a sawn-off shotgun was arrested in Los Angeles.
Divers this morning found the body of another American sailor drowned during yesterday's ferry disaster.
He could reply like a sailor.
Thor Heyerdahl may have been an intrepid sailor, but ancient South Americans apparently weren't.
Ms. FAYE TURNEY (Detained British Sailor): They explained to us why we'd been arrested.
